variant: compare CeraVe vs La Roche-Posay moisturizers in a markdown table

request.message: compare CeraVe vs La Roche-Posay moisturizers in a markdown table

response_body.response: docsbut i can build a table based on what those lines actually do in a routine.  both work in the absorption ladder at step 6 (moisturizer locks in hydration; ceramides + lipids repair barrier). pick based on your skin type: if you're dry or have a compromised barrier, CeraVe's ceramide load is stronger. if you're sensitive or rosacea-prone, La Roche-Posay's thermal water + lighter feel tends to feel less heavy. what's your skin type right now.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.description: 10% niacinamide for sebum control and pore appearance.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.
